name: ExtensionConceptMap_Group_Element_Target_DependsOn_ValueSet
title: R5: The mapping depends on a data element with a value from this value set (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.valueSet` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.valueSet` 0..1 `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ValueSet)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.valueSet` 0..1 `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/ValueSet)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.valueSet` has a context of ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ConceptMap`.
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.valueSet` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The mapping depends on a data element with a value from this value set (new)
element.comment:
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.valueSet` has a context of ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ConceptMap`.
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.valueSet` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: The mapping depends on a data element with a value from this value set
element.definition: This mapping applies if the data element value is a code from this value set.
